title: Medical Emergency — Collapsed Passenger
description: A passenger has collapsed in Terminal 3 Arrival Hall. Bystanders are gathered and an intercom call has been received.

event.details: Caller reports a man has collapsed and is unresponsive near the T3 arrival exit
Crowd forming around a person on the floor — crowd density increasing
Crowd density reaching threshold near exit — risk of bystander obstruction

optimal_response.primary_action: dispatch patrol and call airport medical services T3 ext 5822
optimal_response.secondary_action: clear surrounding area and locate nearest AED
optimal_response.do_not: Do not move the patient if fall or spinal injury is suspected
optimal_response.escalation: If patient has no pulse, escalate to Level 4 and request SCDF ambulance immediately
